name_en: 🔥High quality from the counter🔥 Prada《PRADA》 Upgraded Saffiano Cross-grain Calfskin 🎉Tote Bag🎉 1BA358 New from the counter🎉🎉 Made of Saffiano calfskin, the bag features dual top handles and a detachable shoulder strap for versatile carrying (95cm), very functional 😘 The body is embellished with an engraved logo, which can also be detached and used as an accessory on other bags or clothing, so beautiful 😘 Simple yet stylish and atmospheric, worth owning 😘 Hurry up and get one 👏👏 Length 17 x Height 19 x Base 6cm 🎉🎉🎉 👏👏👏
